summary: Backend testing for HRE Exporter CRM Phase 1. 28/30 tests passed (2 skipped previously, all role tests now passing). Identified 1 real backend bug: initial price history is NOT recorded on POST /api/product-variants. All other endpoints (auth, materials, categories, families, image upload, variants CRUD with manual override + computed final_price, filters, bulk discount preview/apply for material/category/family, role enforcement, dashboard stats, price-history) work correctly with the seeded data (2 materials, nested categories, 3 families, 9 variants).

critical.issue: Initial price history entry NOT recorded on variant creation. Root cause: in server.py `_record_price_history`, the early-return guard `if not variant_before: return` is truthy for an empty dict `{}` (which create_variant passes). So no history is inserted on create. Spec says 'records initial price history'. Fix: change guard to `if variant_before is None: return`. This also means GET /api/product-variants/{id}/price-history returns [] right after a create until the first update.

minor.issue: Floating-point rounding produces inconsistent paise values. e.g. base=4.50, discount=5% computes 4.5 - 0.225 = 4.2750000000000004 -> round(.,2) = 4.28. Banker's rounding + FP imprecision causes 4.27 vs 4.28 ambiguity. Suggest using Decimal with ROUND_HALF_UP for INR price to avoid customer-visible inconsistencies.
Body type is `data: dict` (no Pydantic schema). Should validate scope ∈ {material, category, product_family} via a Pydantic model and require target_id.
No rate limiting / brute force lockout. Auth playbook recommends lockout after N failed attempts. Currently unlimited attempts return 401.
FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated. Use lifespan context. Cosmetic only.
No referential integrity check. Deleting a material/category does not check if variants/families reference it. Could orphan data.
Uses `file.filename` extension only for type check; no MIME/magic-byte verification. Old files are not deleted when a new image overwrites the URL.

action_items: Fix _record_price_history early-return bug in /app/backend/server.py: replace `if not variant_before:` with `if variant_before is None:` so that the initial create entry is persisted.
Consider switching price math to Decimal/ROUND_HALF_UP for stable INR rounding.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: server.py:362 `if not variant_before: return` blocks initial price history (empty dict is falsy).
Pricing rounding uses Python's banker's rounding on float; switch to Decimal for currency.
/api/pricing/bulk-discount/preview takes raw dict; lacks input validation.
No referential integrity on DELETE for material/category/family.
Image upload validates only filename extension (no MIME/magic). Old uploaded files not cleaned up on replace.
Auth has no brute-force protection (no lockout).
JWT expiry is 24h with no refresh endpoint; acceptable for Phase 1 but worth noting.

success_rate.backend: 93% (28/30 tests passing; 2 failures both caused by 1 backend bug)

test_credentials: admin@hrexporter.com / Admin@123 (admin); TEST_employee@hrexporter.com / EmpPass@123 (employee, seeded by test for role check)
seed_data_creation: Test creates a TEST_employee@hrexporter.com user directly in MongoDB (employees role) for 403-enforcement tests. TEST_-prefixed materials/categories/families/variants are created and cleaned up within the same test class. Note: bulk-discount tests mutate seeded variant prices (final_price/discount_percentage) — the seed final_prices are no longer pristine after a test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints listed in the request work except initial-create price history. After main agent fixes the `if not variant_before` guard, re-run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hre_crm_backend.py -v` and the 2 failing tests (test_create_variant_records_history, test_update_variant_price_history) should pass. Bulk-discount tests mutate seeded prices in-place — if pristine seeded prices are needed, drop & re-seed the database before testing. The pymongo dependency is already installed and used in the employee-fixture to create a TEST_ employee user directly in MongoDB.
rca of the issue: RCA: In /app/backend/server.py, `_record_price_history(variant_before, variant_after, ...)` starts with `if not variant_before: return`. The create_variant route calls it as `_record_price_history({}, doc, ...)`. An empty dict is falsy in Python, so the function returns immediately and no history is inserted for the create event. Reproduction: POST /api/product-variants with valid payload, then GET /api/product-variants/{id}/price-history -> returns []. Mitigation: change guard to `if variant_before is None: return` (and keep the subsequent diff check intact). Updates already work correctly; only the initial create entry is missing.
